assert_convention: units=SI-derived (K, GPa), room_temperature=300 K, tc_definition=zero-resistance unless onset explicitly labeled, gap_definition=300 K minus best retained ambient Tc, evidence_tiers=T0-T3 per Phase 20, handling_classes=H0-H3 per Phase 19

scope.purpose: Independent reproduction of Hg1223 PQP retained superconducting state
scope.guardrail: Nothing in this protocol counts as room-temperature progress

nodes.source: arXiv:2603.12437 (extrapolated from PQ=26 GPa warm-quench data)
arXiv:2603.12437 (warm-quench at PQ=26 GPa reported ~139 K)

success_gate.guardrail: Even a clean 151 K reproduction is still 149 K below room temperature

resistivity.geometry: standard bar or van der Pauw on ~50-80 micron crystal
resistivity.zero_resistance_criterion: R < noise floor (specify in run log)
resistivity.onset_criterion: R(T) departure from normal-state extrapolation (log for information only)
resistivity.known_difficulty: Electrical leads may break during pressure quench

structural.diagnostic_indicator: defect broadening in XRD peaks post-PQP

critical_gaps.importance: single most important unknown in reproduction protocol
recommended_actions: Request numerical vQ from Deng-Chu group
If unavailable: bracket with at least 2 decompression rates (fast membrane-DAC vs slow manual screw-DAC)
REQUIRED: record full pressure-release trace (P vs t) for every run
critical_gaps.escalation_rule: If first 3 runs are all T0 with vQ-related issues, escalate to direct replication request

critical_gaps.description: Exact Hg1223 preparation for PQP compatibility
critical_gaps.importance: sample-state dependence is a known failure mode (Phase 20)
recommended_actions: Use standard Hg1223 synthesis (high-pressure sealed-tube method)
Log oxygen-history class (delta if measured, annealing history)
Log sample class for every run

critical_gaps.description: Electrical contact survival during pressure quench

preconditions.requirement: Assign unique run ID, sample ID, and sample class
Record oxygen or anneal history class and basic geometry
Confirm intended high-Tc source state under pressure before release
preconditions.consequence_if_missing: T0 (invalid); cannot distinguish source-state failure from quench failure

preconditions.requirement: Arm pressure-release trace capture for full vQ trajectory
Prepare ambient-pressure cryogenic measurement path before quench begins
preconditions.consequence_if_missing: Run validity depends on handling class; unplanned warming above 200 K invalidates

preconditions.requirement: Assign handling class before the run starts
preconditions.consequence_if_missing: T0 (invalid) if handling class is assigned post-hoc

per_run_steps.name: In-DAC targeting
actions: Confirm source state via in-DAC transport
per_run_steps.stop_condition: If source state not confirmed: STOP, log as target-state failure

per_run_steps.name: Quench event
actions: Verify pressure-release trace capture is armed
Execute rapid decompression from PQ to ambient at TQ
Record full P vs t trace

per_run_steps.name: Immediate retained-state check
actions: Perform first cryogenic transport at ambient pressure before unplanned warm excursion
Record first measurement timestamp and thermal path
Measure R(T) from base to at least 200 K
Record retained Tc (onset, for information only)

per_run_steps.name: Cryogenic hold
actions: R(T) checkpoints at ~24 h and ~72 h
per_run_steps.benchmark: Hg1223 PQP stable >= 3 days at 77 K

per_run_steps.name: Controlled intermediate warm hold
per_run_steps.benchmark: Hg1223 PQP begins degrading at ~170-200 K

per_run_steps.name: Controlled high warm hold
per_run_steps.prerequisite: Step 6 complete or skipped per handling class

per_run_steps.name: Retrieval gate
conditions: Run survives to chosen handling-class stage
per_run_steps.warning: If retrieval thermal path not logged, ex-DAC results are T0

per_run_steps.name: Ex-DAC follow-up
per_run_steps.benchmark: ~78% SC volume fraction with partial annealing to ~140 K

handling_classes.name: Cryogenic-first benchmark path
handling_classes.thermal_path_rule: No unplanned excursion above assigned cryogenic stage before first retained-state measurement and 77 K hold checkpoints
handling_classes.assignment: Default for all Stage A runs; first runs at each node MUST be H0

handling_classes.name: Controlled intermediate-warm path
handling_classes.thermal_path_rule: After H0 steps complete: one planned 160-170 K hold

handling_classes.name: Controlled high-warm path
handling_classes.thermal_path_rule: After H1 complete: one planned 200 K hold
handling_classes.assignment: Later-stage stress within a surviving run

handling_classes.name: Room-temperature stress path
handling_classes.thermal_path_rule: After all earlier evidence captured: one planned 293 K excursion
handling_classes.assignment: Last step only; NEVER part of first success gate

invalidation_rules.trigger: Source state not confirmed under pressure before release
invalidation_rules.consequence: T0; cannot distinguish source-state failure from quench failure

invalidation_rules.trigger: Full vQ or pressure-release trace is missing or corrupted
invalidation_rules.consequence: T0; vQ is a REQUIRED control variable

invalidation_rules.trigger: Sample class or oxygen-history class is missing
Unplanned warm excursion before next scheduled retained-state checkpoint
invalidation_rules.consequence: T0; metastable phase may have annealed before measurement

invalidation_rules.trigger: Retrieval occurs without logged thermal pathway
invalidation_rules.consequence: T0 for ex-DAC data only; in-DAC data may remain valid

invalidation_rules.trigger: Stage tags incomplete enough that failure localization is impossible
invalidation_rules.consequence: T0; cannot route through diagnostic tree

evidence_tiers.label: Headline reproduction candidate
evidence_tiers.requirements: Full PQ/TQ/vQ trace, source state confirmed, first ambient cryogenic retained-state check, countable artifact bundle
evidence_tiers.allowed_claim: Valid attempt reached headline gate; no basin language

evidence_tiers.label: Basin-candidate support
evidence_tiers.requirements: T1 + replicate support at one fixed node + 24 h 77 K hold
evidence_tiers.allowed_claim: Reproducibility window may exist; no strengthened-route language

evidence_tiers.label: Strengthened-route support
evidence_tiers.requirements: T2 + ex-DAC follow-up with bulk support and controlled retrieval
evidence_tiers.allowed_claim: Route improving beyond headline status; no room-temperature language

methods.name: Ruby fluorescence
methods.specification: Standard R1 line shift; calibrate against Mao 1986 or Dewaele 2008 scale
methods.when_to_use: Preferred for DACs with optical access at cryogenic temperatures

methods.name: Diamond Raman edge
methods.specification: Raman shift of diamond anvil; calibrate against known scale
methods.when_to_use: Alternative when ruby fluorescence is impractical

pressure_calibration.requirement: Method and scale must be recorded in run log for every run; pressure in GPa

checkpoints.assessment: Operational issues? All T0 -> escalate per vQ section

checkpoints.target: At least 6 runs complete (one per node)

checkpoints.assessment: Final assessment against 131 K success gate

known_high_confidence: Retained Tc at low TQ: 147-151 K (zero-resistance, retained ambient, metastable)
Retained Tc at warm TQ: ~139 K at PQ~26 GPa (zero-resistance, retained ambient, metastable)
SC volume fraction: ~78% in retrieved samples
inferred_medium_confidence: General DAC quench procedure transferable across PQP material families
Rapid decompression sufficient (numerical vQ not published)
Cryogenic hold at 77 K is standard stability test
unknown_low_confidence: vQ (decompression rate): not published for any PQP system
Exact Hg1223 sample preparation for PQP compatibility
Lead survivability during quench: no published mitigation
Meissner fraction reproducibility: single data point (~78%)

vald_01_compliance: Every Tc value specifies: definition (zero-resistance or onset), operating conditions (retained ambient, stable ambient, or under pressure), and phase state (metastable or stable)
vald_02_compliance: Room-temperature gap = 300 - 151 = 149 K stated explicitly; no room-temperature progress language used
sources: arXiv:2603.12437 (Deng, Chu et al., PNAS 2026) -- Hg1223 PQP
PNAS 118, e2108938118 (Deng et al., 2021) -- FeSe PQP
PNAS e2423102122 (Deng et al., 2025) -- BST PQP
Nature Commun. 6, 8990 (Gao et al., 2015) -- Hg-family pressure
